form.formComment: Was sixth in a Grade 5 two back then given a six-and-a-half months break after failing to finish at Ballarat last time. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was sixth in a Grade 5 two back then given a six-and-a-half months break after failing to finish at Ballarat last time. Should be in this for a long way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Faltered approaching 150m mark and tailed off.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (17.35) over 300m at this track. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (17.35) over 300m at this track. Has a low draw. Has ability and should run well.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at Geelong. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at Geelong. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 300m at this track behind My Boy Sonny beaten 5.5 lengths (17.16). Capable of a strong show.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 300m at this track behind My Boy Sonny beaten 5.5 lengths (17.16). Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when third behind Tipsy Turtle at this track last start over 300m (17.42). Has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good improvement when third behind Tipsy Turtle at this track last start over 300m (17.42). Has to be included.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.83) at Bendigo in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.83) at Bendigo in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 300m at this track beaten 5.5 lengths (17.22) behind Jams Donuts in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on April 8. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 300m at this track beaten 6 lengths (17.24) behind My Boy Sonny in a Grade 5 on April 10. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Has finished last in his last couple of starts, most recently at Warragul over 400m. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.
